query:
-- إضافة بيانات الحضور والانصراف ليوم 30 يناير 2026 لجميع العمال
INSERT INTO attendance_events (worker_id, event_type, event_time, notes, created_at)
SELECT 
  w.id,
  'check_in' as event_type,
  '2026-01-30 08:00:00' as event_time,
  'حضور صباحي - 30 يناير 2026' as notes,
  NOW() as created_at
FROM workers w
WHERE w.id NOT IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT worker_id FROM attendance_events 
  WHERE DATE(event_time) = '2026-01-30'
);

-- إضافة سجلات الانصراف
INSERT INTO attendance_events (worker_id, event_type, event_time, notes, created_at)
SELECT 
  w.id,
  'check_out' as event_type,
  '2026-01-30 16:30:00' as event_time,
  'انصراف مسائي - 30 يناير 2026' as notes,
  NOW() as created_at
FROM workers w
WHERE w.id NOT IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT worker_id FROM attendance_events 
  WHERE DATE(event_time) = '2026-01-30' AND event_type = 'check_out'
);
